events.title: 🌈 Heidi N Closet Live
events.description:
📰 If you weren’t at tonight’s RuPaul’s Drag Race Viewing Party, then you missed one of our BIG announcements! 👀✨

For the first time since appearing on RuPaul’s Drag Race Season 12, Heidi N Closet is returning to the stage of her home bar! 💖

🔥That’s right — don’t miss your chance to catch Heidi N Closet live at Chemistry on Saturday, May 16! 👑

events.title: 🌈 RuPaul’s Drag Race All Stars Season 11 Premiere Viewing Party
events.description:
🗞 Get ready for a fabulous Friday night! 🎉 
Join us at Chemistry Nightclub for the Season 11 premiere of RuPaul’s Drag Race All Stars and be among the first to hear what exciting events we have lined up in the coming weeks. Expect fierce looks, big energy, and an unforgettable vibe.

Mystique Summers is tonight's special guest for the viewing party! If you have some, come prepared with your questions for the drag panel!

💃 Don’t miss it—come celebrate, cheer, and slay the night away! ✨
 Greensboro's LGBTQ+ nightclub

events.title: 🌈 College Kickback Karaoke Night
events.description:
🎤 Join Us for College Kickback Karaoke Night at Chemistry Nightclub! 🎤 
Whether you’re a karaoke pro or just want to cheer on your friends, it’s the perfect night to show off your talent and have some fun! Don’t miss your chance to take the stage!
🕗 Doors Open: 8:00 PM – 2:00 AM
🎶 Karaoke Time: 9:00 PM – 1:00 AM
💲 Cover Charge: Enjoy FREE entry all night long!
🆕 Age Requirements: 18+ to join us, 21+ to drink
🍹 Drink Specials All Night: 
$4.50 Well Drinks
$3 Domestic Beers
Special Prices on Select Liquors and Beers
Gather your friends and come enjoy a night of laughter, music, and great drinks! We can’t wait to see you there! 🌟
 Greensboro's LGBTQ+ nightclub

events.title: 🌈 Miss Chemistry Newcomer Pageant
events.description:
👑 It’s Pageant Time! 👑

Are you a new queen (4 years or less in performative drag) ready to step into the spotlight and become part of the Miss Chemistry Newcomer legacy? ✨
Your moment is almost here.

📅 Pageant Date: June 21
📄 Registration Packets now available!

✨ Categories Include:
🎨 Creative PRIDE Presentation (celebrate Pride your way!)
🎤 On-Stage Question
🎭 Talent

💰 Prize Package
Over $600 in cash & prizes awarded throughout pageant night and at the winner’s give-up next year!

📩 Ready to compete?
Send us a DM to receive your registration packet and take your first step toward the crown 👑

🔥 Step up. Stand out. Claim your spotlight. 🔥
 Greensboro's LGBTQ+ nightclub

events.description:

events.title: 🌈 Paisley Parque’s Sex Kitten Round Up — Studio 54 Edition!
events.description:
🕺🕺 💃🕺 💃💃 Paisley Parque’s Sex Kitten Round Up — Studio 54 Edition! 🕺🕺 💃🕺 💃💃
Disco fever is back! Dust off your boogie shoes, leisure suits & sequins and come relive the era as we celebrate Studio 54’s opening anniversary (April 26, 1977) at Chemistry Nightclub!

🕺🕺 💃🕺 💃💃 Couples Dance Showdown! 🕺🕺 💃🕺 💃💃
Think you’ve got the moves to steal the spotlight? Join us at the 10PM show during our Sex Kitten Round Up Studio 54 party for an electrifying dance-off competition! ✨
Grab your partner, create your best choreography to "You Should Be Dancing" by the BeeGees, and bring the disco heat to the floor.  Host, Paisley Parque  will call up those who wish to compete during the 10pm show. That will be your chance to show us what you’ve got and possibly win! 💫

🚪 Hours: 7:15 PM – 2:00 AM
💃 Drag Shows at 8:15 PM, 10:00 PM, and 12:30 AM
🎤 Hosted by: Paisley Parque
✨ Additional Performances by: Aphasia Chanellor and Kourtnee Pope-kollins
🎧 Dance Floor: DJ Alan will be spinning the hits of the 70s through today  after the 10 PM show!

💲 Cover Charges:
Ages 21+
• Free before 10 PM
• $7 from 10 PM–12 AM
• $10 after midnight
Ages 18–20
• $20 all night
 Greensboro's LGBTQ+ nightclub

events.title: 🎵 Bar Reopening
events.description:
🌨️🤠 Y’all listen up! Due to the snowstorm rolling in, we’re saddling up and closing the doors to the bar tonight! 🌨️🥃 

We’ll be back to kick up some dust as soon as the snow melts…. We’ll see you next Friday! Stay safe and keep those boots warm! ❄️✨

events.description:

🕣 Doors open at 8:30 PM—come early to grab a good spot! 
👉 This is an 18+ shindig, with a special champagne toast at midnight for the 21+ crowd! 🍾

🎟️ Tickets are available online [thru Eventbrite]—don’t miss your chance to ring in the new year with a bang!

#NewYearsEve #CountryHoedown #BootScootin #ChampagneToast #CelebrateInStyle

events.title: 🌈 Cinco de Mayo Margarita Tasting
events.description:
Join us on Tuesday for cocktails, mocktails, wine, beer, and a Cinco de Mayo Margarita Tasting. We'll be featuring Butch Segal of Butch Law. They will be holding weekly office hours, Noon-5 pm on Thursdays at the Center to answer your legal questions.  Areas include estate planning, name changes, small business law, event law, and divorces without minor children. We are so excited to partner with Butch and thankful for this service!
 Advancing equality and inclusion through philanthropy, programming, and advocacy that uplifts the LGBTQ community.

SPECIAL PRIZES TONIGHT: Win Tickets to see SIX the MUSICAL at The Tanger Center. Enter to win VIP passes to PATTIE GONIA's Washington DC show. You get yourself to DC, and we'll get you in to see Pattie!
Bingo Tickets at LINK in BIO
 Advancing equality and inclusion through philanthropy, programming, and advocacy that uplifts the LGBTQ community.

events.title: 🌈 Pride Celebration
events.description:
Are you ready to celebrate Pride?!? Pride in our gender identity, gender expression, and sexual orientation happens year-round, and it's also great to have opportunities to celebrate together!

Join us at the Pyrle Theater in downtown Greensboro for a day of celebration on Saturday, June 20. The fun kicks off in the afternoon with family-friendly songs led by Mr. Sam of Scuppernong's Saturday Get-Downs, followed by a pizza dance party for youth and teens. To close out the night, the 21+ crowd will be treated to performances by drag superstars Thigh Fieri, Franny Starlight, and Brenda the Drag Queen, with DJ SmoothE providing tunes throughout the evening.

The Pyrle will have food and drinks available to keep the fun going. Tickets will be available soon through the Pyrle, so stay tuned!
 Advancing equality and inclusion through philanthropy, programming, and advocacy that uplifts the LGBTQ community.

events.title: 🌈 GGF & Carolina Aging Alliance Gallery Meetup
events.description:
Events this Week and Weekend: 
💚Join GGF, Carolina Aging Alliance, and the Marshall Muse Gallery on Friday, April 17 from 5:30-7:30 PM. Together we'll meet, make new friends, and enjoy one of Greensboro's newest art gallery and studio spaces!
💚GGF's GAYme night is taking place this Saturday, April 18 from 6-10 PM at the Center! As always, we'll have a collection of games and cards available for play, and plenty of tables, so there will be something for everyone at this free event.
GAYme night is for adults 18+
 Advancing equality and inclusion through philanthropy, programming, and advocacy that uplifts the LGBTQ community.

events.title: 🌈 First Tuesdays with Friends
events.description:
Join us for the KICKOFF of "First Tuesdays with Friends" TONIGHT, Tuesday April 7.  This is a new monthly social presented by GGF and Lewis & Elm that will be held on the first Tuesday of each month. Come enjoy some wine, cocktails, tasty non-alcoholic options, and delicious food in downtown Greensboro's Southend.
Lewis & Elm will be donating 15% of cocktail and mocktail sales to promote the vision of GGF to create a thriving LGBTQ community in the Triad.
This new monthly event will be in addition-to our Takeovers, where we will hop around the Triad.
The evening at Lewis & Elm is drop-in style between 5:30-7:30. Come when you can, leave when you must! See you tonight!
 Advancing equality and inclusion through philanthropy, programming, and advocacy that uplifts the LGBTQ community.

events.description:

events.title: 🌈 Annual Gala
events.description:
Tickets are on sale now for our annual Gala! We'll be at Cadillac Service Garage to celebrate all we have done and all we can do with your support. With a little Courage, a lot of Heart, and a sprinkling of Starlight, we'll hear the motivational message of Dr. Demetre Daskalakis followed by the musical stylings of Franny Starlight and the Brass Boudoir. Then plan to dance the night away with DJ Robin Chante. Special appearance by the illustrious Brenda the Drag Queen! 
Ticket and Sponsorship Info at LINK in BIO. cadillacservicegarage 1618onlocation drdemetre frannystarlight brendathedragqueen djrobinchante
 Advancing equality and inclusion through philanthropy, programming, and advocacy that uplifts the LGBTQ community.

events.title: 🍽️ Community Art Grant Application Deadline
events.description:
14 MORE DAYS TO APPLY!!!! We are grateful to be in community and partnership with East White Oak Community Center and Creative Greensboro! Link to Apply in our bios! 

Text forwarded from creativegreensboro Creative Greensboro has awarded its second Community Art grant to local organization, gso_mutual_aid! They are currently looking for artists to apply for a variety of public led art projects in the East White Oak community, including:

An indoor mural at Peeler Recreation Center that showcases the history of East White Oak Community Center.

Educational/way-finding signage and a Little Free Library onsite at East White Oak Community Center.

Artwork on the basketball court backboards at nearby Bywoods Park

If you are an interested Guilford County based artist apply online by March 31 at 5 pm. Link is in our bio!

#artistcall #publicarts #creativegreensboro

#greensboronc #localartists
 Mutual aid & community fridge in Greensboro.

events.title: 🍽️ Mutual Aid Fundraiser for Local Queer Parent
events.description:
A local queer parent needs $200 to keep the lights and water on after a medical emergency that’s identified chronic conditions. They need this by Sunday, 1/4.

$110/$200 raised
PayPal: GSOMitualAid@gmail.com
DM for cashapp or Venmo
Put hearts 💞 in the memo
 Mutual aid & community fridge in Greensboro.

events.title: 🍽️ National Homeless Persons’ Memorial Walk
events.location: Greensboro Urban Ministry, 305 w gate city blvd
events.description:
Wednesday, December 17th, at 5pm people will gather at Greensboro Urban Ministry for the National Homeless Persons’ Memorial Walk. The event is to honor our neighbors who have died homeless. 

The walk will be down Gate City Blvd and end at Grace Community Church where the names of those who we have lost this year will be read aloud, afterwards dinner will be served. 

Greensboro Urban Ministry - 305 w gate city blvd
Grace Community Church - 643 w gate city blvd
 Mutual aid & community fridge in Greensboro.

events.title: 🤝 That’s My Story
events.description:
Go beyond the page at the 2026 Greensboro Bound Book Festival. 💞

Led by the talented team at o.henrymag our April 11 Writers Workshops feature a full lineup of editors and storytellers:

10:00 -11:15 AM | Cassie Bustamante (Editor) & David Bailey (Contributing Editor) | That’s My Story

1:30-2:45 PM | Jim Dodson (Founding Editor) | The Art of the Research Interview

1:30–2:45 PM |Billy Ingram (Contributer) | Writing as a Second or Third Act

events.description:
Unleash your inner writer at the 2026 Greensboro Bound Book Festival.

On April 11, ericamiriamfabri joins our o.henrymag Writers Workshops, leading Making the Public Personal: Writing Autobiographical Poetry Inspired by Current Events.

Author of “Dialect of a Skirt” and “Morphology,” Fabri brings a powerful perspective on writing from lived experience.

events.title: 🤝 2026 Greensboro Bound Book Festival
events.description:
libbybuckwrites brings her debut novel “Port Anna” to the 2026 Greensboro Bound Book Festival on April 11.

Set along the rugged coast of Maine, the novel explores family, memory, and the pull of place, revealing how personal histories and changing communities shape a broader American story.

#greensboroboundbookfestival #greensboronc #visitgreensboro
 Connecting readers and writers through year-round events and the annual Greensboro Bound Book Festival.

events.title: 🤝 2026 Book Festival
events.description:
Jade Song is joining us for our 2026 Book Festival! 

A writer, filmmaker, and artist, Song is the author of “Chlorine” and the newly published “I Love You Don’t Die.” Across fiction and film, their work explores identity, obsession, and transformation, reflecting the strange, layered, and ever-shifting nature of contemporary life.

jadessong’s work speaks directly to our 2026 theme, American Kaleidoscope, revealing how culture, desire, and perspective combine to shape the stories we tell about ourselves and one another.

#greensboroboundbookfestival #greensboronc #visitgreensboro
 Connecting readers and writers through year-round events and the annual Greensboro Bound Book Festival.

events.title: 🤝 Book Festival
events.description:
Our Book Festival runs on volunteers. From welcoming authors and helping with book signings to guiding guests between venues and assisting with check-in, volunteers help make the whole weekend happen.

Want to be part of it? Sign up to volunteer at our 🔗 LINK IN BIO!
